entities.name: INCLUSIVE AGRIPRENEURSHIP
entities.description: The practice of inclusive entrepreneurship within agriculture to foster growth and security

entities.name: EQUITABLE ECONOMIC GROWTH
entities.description: Economic growth that is shared fairly among all participants

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SECTOR
entities.description: The part of the economy dedicated to the production of food and fiber
